'''vawoko''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ibacitabine|ibacitabine]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-w-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ibacitabine|ibacitabine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| vawoko
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:væweketh|væweketh]] || [[word:væwekej|væwekej]] || [[word:væwekesh|væwekesh]] || [[word:væweke|væweke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vawowokoth|vawowokoth]] || [[word:vawowokoj|vawowokoj]] || [[word:vawowokosh|vawowokosh]] || [[word:vawowoko|vawowoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vawokoth|vawokoth]] || [[word:vawokoj|vawokoj]] || [[word:vawokosh|vawokosh]] || [[word:vawoko|vawoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vawofkofth|vawofkofth]] || [[word:vawofkofj|vawofkofj]] || [[word:vawofkofsh|vawofkofsh]] || [[word:vawofkof|vawofkof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vawokotho|vawokotho]] || [[word:vawokojo|vawokojo]] || [[word:vawokosho|vawokosho]] || [[word:vawokoko|vawokoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vawokoth|vawokoth]] || [[word:vawokoj|vawokoj]] || [[word:vawokosh|vawokosh]] || [[word:vawoko|vawoko]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vawokothol|vawokothol]] || [[word:vawokojol|vawokojol]] || [[word:vawokoshol|vawokoshol]] || [[word:vawokokol|vawokokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vawokoothotho|vawokoothotho]] || [[word:vawokoojojo|vawokoojojo]] || [[word:vawokooshosho|vawokooshosho]] || [[word:vawokooko|vawokooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vawokothon|vawokothon]] || [[word:vawokojon|vawokojon]] || [[word:vawokoshon|vawokoshon]] || [[word:vawokokon|vawokokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vawokothooro|vawokothooro]] || [[word:vawokojooro|vawokojooro]] || [[word:vawokoshooro|vawokoshooro]] || [[word:vawokokooro|vawokokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d5728ff}}
